Doral Home Loans

FHA loans in Doral, Florida

Doral has transformed into one of Miami-Dade's premier business and residential hubs, full of newer townhomes, condos, and single-family communities. It's more expensive than much of the county, and Miami-Dade's high-cost FHA limit helps — but Doral's pricier luxury inventory can still exceed FHA limits. The key is knowing where FHA fits: mid-market condos and townhomes, common throughout Doral.

Miami-Dade County FHA limit (1-unit)$667,000

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Doral

Miami-Dade County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 statewide floor — meaning you can finance higher-priced Doral homes than in most of Florida. Confirm Miami-Dade County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. Even with the higher limit, Doral's luxury homes can exceed it — FHA buyers here tend to focus on mid-market condos and townhomes.

Where FHA fits in Doral's condo and townhome market

Much of Doral is condos and townhomes — and FHA requires the building/association to be FHA-approved or the unit to qualify for Single-Unit Approval; many newer Doral communities can qualify, but it must be checked (see our condo guide). We'll confirm Miami-Dade's exact figure with HUD and pinpoint the Doral homes and units that fit your FHA budget.

Down payment help for Doral buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Doral buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Miami-Dade County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Doral

We help buyers throughout Doral and Miami-Dade County, including Downtown Doral, Doral Isles, and Sabal Chase. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Doral (Miami-Dade County) for 2026?+
Miami-Dade is a high-cost county, so its 2026 FHA limit is $667,000, above the $541,287 Florida floor. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Can I use FHA in pricey Doral?+
Yes, in the right segments. Doral's luxury homes can exceed FHA limits, but FHA works well on mid-market condos and townhomes, which are common here.
Can I buy a Doral condo or townhome with FHA?+
Yes, if the building/association is FHA-approved or the unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval. We verify before you offer.
How much down payment do I need in Doral?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits help in a higher-priced market.
Do you serve all of Miami-Dade?+
Yes — Doral, Miami, Hialeah, Homestead, and surrounding communities.
